hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "MAP HQ is active. RULES: (1) Run --compliance before implementing anything involving people/contracts/data/safety. (2) Route complex research goals through launch.py. (3) Use MAP HQ workers for multi-step tasks with 3+ components. (4) Consult hr_compliance/employment_law/payroll/data_privacy/workplace_safety specialists mid-task when needed."}'

cd /Users/petergirgis/agent-ecosystem && python3 -c "
import sys, re
prompt = open('/dev/stdin').read() if not sys.stdin.isatty() else ''
kws = ['hire','fire','employ','contract','salary','pay','benefit','data','privacy','gdpr','ccpa','user data','personal','safety','injury','incident','nda','severance','equity','contractor','termina']
if any(k in prompt.lower() for k in kws):
    print('{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️  COMPLIANCE TRIGGER DETECTED — run: python3 scripts/launch.py --compliance \\\"describe what you are doing\\\" BEFORE proceeding. MAP HQ rules require compliance pre-check for people/contract/data/safety decisions.\"}')
" 2>/dev/null || true

cp /Users/petergirgis/agent-ecosystem/CLAUDE.md "/Users/petergirgis/Desktop/claude md backup/CLAUDE_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).md" && echo '{"systemMessage": "✅ CLAUDE.md backed up to Desktop/claude md backup"}' || true

cd /Users/petergirgis/agent-ecosystem && git status --porcelain CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  CLAUDE.md has uncommitted changes — update it to reflect all code changes before committing."}' || true

cd /Users/petergirgis/agent-ecosystem && git status --porcelain agents/ utils/ web/ scripts/ monitor/ .claude/ 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo '{"systemMessage": "REMINDER: Uncommitted code changes — run: git add -A && git commit && git push"}' || true
